programme.title: ⭐⭐ 3.5m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Three and a half meters with offshore wind; another day dodging closeouts, or maybe just watching others try.
🌊 Swell: 3.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h ENE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 42.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 3.3m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Those 3.3m Supertubos ramps might offer something rideable, provided you enjoy a good thrashing.
🌊 Swell: 3.3m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h ENE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 35.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 3.3m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that much wind fighting the 3.3m swell, you're mostly signing up for a beating out there today.
🌊 Swell: 3.3m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h ENE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 35.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 3.3m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a 3.3m swell and that wind, today's bodyboarding at Cantinho is best viewed from the cafe.
🌊 Swell: 3.3m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h ENE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 35.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 3.3m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
That 3.3m swell and onshore wind suggests a day for watching the waves close out spectacularly.
🌊 Swell: 3.3m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h ENE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 35.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 3.3m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 3.3m and that wind, Lagide will be a washing machine today, best enjoyed from the bar.
🌊 Swell: 3.3m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h ENE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 35.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 3.4m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a 3.4m swell and that crosswind, today's Ribeira session promises a workout more than a ride.
🌊 Swell: 3.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h NNE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.0m

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 3.2m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 3.2m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
3.2 meters with this wind? Likely a good day to watch from the beach, unless you enjoy a beating.
🌊 Swell: 3.2m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 22.0km/h NNE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 36.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.9m

programme.title: 💨 3.2m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
At 3.2 metres with that wind, it'll be a washing machine out there; best to admire the Atlantic's fury from the café.
🌊 Swell: 3.2m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 22.0km/h NNE (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 36.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.9m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy
